name: Eiger Trail Hike
description: Walk directly beneath the legendary Eiger North Face on this iconic alpine trail.
longDescription: The Eiger Trail runs from Eigergletscher station to Alpiglen directly below the infamous Eiger North Face — one of the most dramatic backdrops in the Alps. This 6km trail offers close-up views of the 1,800m vertical wall that has challenged mountaineers for over a century.

providers.name: Jungfrau Railways (Train to Eigergletscher)
providers.description: Train access — trail itself is free

marketplaces.description: Switzerland's biggest activities marketplace — verified suppliers, free cancellation
